Uses of Interface
recoder.kit.ProblemReport

Packages that use ProblemReport
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.removegenerics
 
recoder.kit
 
recoder.kit.transformation
 
recoder.kit.transformation.java5to4
Contains transformations which attempt to make a java5 project compilable with -source 1.4 compiler switch and which can be used by a java 1.4 runtime environment.

    Description

    ResolveGenerics.analyze()
    Analyse a compilation unit to remove all traces of generic entities.

  • Uses of ProblemReport in recoder.kit

    Classes in recoder.kit that implement ProblemReport
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Conflict
    Problem report indicating that the planned transformation produces a conflict with existing model elements.
    class 
    DifferentReturnTypeOverwrite
    Problem report indicating that a method has been overwritten with a different return type.
    class 
    Equivalence
    Problem report indicating that the planned transformation is applicable and will not change the functional behavior of the program.
    class 
    FinalOverwrite
    Problem report indicating that a member has been overwritten that was declared final, or was in a final type.
    class 
    Identity
    Problem report indicating that the planned transformation is redundant.
    class 
    IllegalInterfaceMember
    Problem report indicating that a member declaration is not a valid member of an interface.
    class 
    IllegalName
    Problem report indicating that a chosen name is illegal, for instance a keyword.
    class 
    MissingSources
    Problem report indicating that the planned transformation is not possible due to missing sources.
    class 
    MissingTypeDeclarations
    Problem report indicating that certain class types have no source representation.
    class 
    MorePrivateOverwrite
    Problem report indicating that a method has been overwritten with a lower visibility.
    class 
    NameConflict
    Problem report indicating that the planned transformation produces a name conflict with an existing model element.
    class 
    NonStaticOverwrite
    Problem report indicating that a static method has been overwritten with a non-static version.
    class 
    NoProblem
    Problem report returned by the analysis phase of a Transformation indicating that the planned transformation is applicable.
    class 
    Problem
    Problem report returned by the analysis phase of a Transformation indicating that the planned transformation is not applicable.
    class 
    UncoveredExceptionsOverwrite
    Problem report indicating that a method has been overwritten with a version that offers more strict exceptions.
    Methods in recoder.kit that return ProblemReport
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ProblemReport
    TwoPassTransformation.analyze()
    Prepares all necessary information for the syntactic transformation and checks the transformation requirements.
    ProblemReport
    Transformation.execute()
    Performs the transformation.
    ProblemReport
    TwoPassTransformation.execute()
    Convenience template method that calls TwoPassTransformation.analyze()and TwoPassTransformation.transform()if the result was NoProblemand not Identity.
    ProblemReport
    Transformation.getProblemReport()
    Returns the problem report.
    protected ProblemReport
    Transformation.setProblemReport(ProblemReport report)
    Sets the problem report.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected ProblemReport
    Transformation.setProblemReport(ProblemReport report)
    Sets the problem report.

  • Uses of ProblemReport in recoder.kit.transformation

    Classes in recoder.kit.transformation that implement ProblemReport
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    PrepareStatementList.IllegalParentContext
    Problem report indicating that a parent is not suited for a given child.
    static class 
    RenameMethod.MissingMethodDeclarations
    Problem report indicating that certain method declarations redefining the method to rename are not available in source code.
    Methods in recoder.kit.transformation that return ProblemReport
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ProblemReport
    AppendMember.analyze()
    Deprecated.
    Finds out where to insert the new member.
    ProblemReport
    Modify.analyze()
    Deprecated.
    Does not check vadility of modification.
    ProblemReport
    PrepareStatementList.analyze()
    Returns a new PrepareStatementList.IllegalParentContext if the statement is not embedded in a statement container, otherwise Transformation.NO_PROBLEMif the statement is a local variable declaration (which might potentially change program semantics), otherwise Transformation.EQUIVALENCE.
    ProblemReport
    PrependExpressionWithStatements.analyze()
     
    ProblemReport
    RemoveRedundantTypeReferences.analyze()
    Returns Transformation.EQUIVALENCEor Transformation.IDENTITY.
    ProblemReport
    RemoveUnusedImports.analyze()
    Returns Transformation.EQUIVALENCEor Transformation.IDENTITY.
    ProblemReport
    RenameMethod.analyze()
    Collects all related methods and all references.
    ProblemReport
    RenamePackage.analyze()
    Collects all references to the package.
    ProblemReport
    RenameType.analyze()
    Collects all references to the type and all existing array variants, as well as all constructor declarations.
    ProblemReport
    RenameVariable.analyze()
    Collects all references to the variable.
    ProblemReport
    ShiftPreceedingStatementExpressions.analyze()
    Finds out which expressions have to be shifted and their types, creates new temporary variable declarations with new names, replacement references, and prepares the parent for insertion unless it happens to be a field specification.
